holdings.infoBox: BFLX is an equity ETF with a total of 567 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 4.89%, Apple at 3.88%, The TJX Companies at 3.57%, Alphabet at 3.19%, and Microsoft at 2.97%.

overview.description: The iShares Flexible Equity Active ETF (BFLX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is very actively managed, the flexible design provides globally diversified equity exposure, combining long/short positioning, multi-asset capabilities, across a broad range of securities and markets. BFLX was launched on May 19, 2026 and is issued by BlackRock.
